calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Court Trial and sent forthwith from Department 206 for a request for Judgment against Defendant Bernard Alvarado.

Dept:505; Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:22:49 a.m. and concluding at 10:27:14 a.m.(D505)

Robert Kennard, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Barclays Bank Delaware.
Defendant Bernard Alvarado not appearing.
Joharra French, sworn to testify for the plaintiff as records custodian and QA Lead.

Notice of time and place of trial filed Mar-25-2025.

Counsel proceeds as to offer of proof.
Witness is placed under direct examination.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff is to recover from the Defendant as follows:
Damages $3,590.27
Interest $0
Costs $341.55
Attorney's Fees $0
Total Judgment $3,931.82

Proposed judgment signed and filed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Set For Trial On May-19-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
